steps.title: Identify the explanation proposal and its challenge
steps.content: Text 1 proposes Miller & Simpson's explanation for why DNA appears thousands of years after extinction: arctic surface preservation could allow mammoths' remains to leach DNA over millennia. Text 2 identifies the critical flaw: scavengers and weathering would destroy surface remains far too quickly for this scenario to work.

steps.title: Match to the relationship between texts
steps.content: B correctly identifies the relationship: Text 1 presents findings and proposes an explanation (Miller & Simpson's preservation hypothesis), while Text 2 provides details (weathering and scavengers) that undermine it. The other three mischaracterize what's occurring—treating the explanation as methodology critique (C), as a study approach (A), or as the basis for reconciliation (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
